zh.title: Solana/美元技术分析：短期承压，震荡整理为主
zh.content:
当前SOL/USD价格小幅下跌至61.92美元，处于20日均线62.74美元下方，显示短期空头压力明显。价格在62.19美元的高点受阻，低点61.88美元附近有初步支撑，整体走势呈现轻微震荡整理格局。短线投资者需注意价格未能突破均线的压力。  

MACD处于-0.855的负值区间，显示动能偏弱，市场多头动力不足，但尚未形成明显下跌加速信号。缺失RSI值限制了超买超卖的判断，但结合均线和价格波动，可认为短线仍在整理阶段，波动幅度有限。  

支撑位重点关注61.80美元附近，一旦跌破可能加速回调至61.50美元附近；阻力位在62.20-62.75美元区间，突破后可试探63美元关口。均线压制与MACD空头倾向提示反弹空间受限，短线操作宜以高抛低吸为主。  

交易策略上，建议观望或轻仓逢低布局，短线可在支撑附近尝试低位买入，止损设在61.70美元以下；若价格上破62.75美元，则可考虑顺势追涨，目标关注63.50美元。总体来看，SOL仍处于整理震荡，切勿过度追高。

en.title: Solana vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Solana is currently moving within a tight consolidation range after a mild intraday decline, with price action hovering just below the 20-period SMA. The broader short-term trend leans slightly bearish as the market fails to sustain moves above the moving average at 62.74. Price compression between 61.88 and 62.19 suggests indecision, often preceding a volatility expansion. Overall structure indicates sideways-to-soft momentum rather than a strong directional breakout.

Momentum indicators reinforce weakening bullish pressure. The MACD reading at -0.8553 remains in negative territory, indicating persistent downside momentum or at least a lack of bullish continuation. With no signal line provided, confirmation is limited, but price behavior below the 20-SMA aligns with bearish momentum bias. RSI is unavailable, yet price clustering near session lows implies subdued buying strength and cautious sentiment among traders.

Immediate support is established near the session low around 61.88, with a slightly deeper cushion likely around 61.50 if selling pressure extends. On the upside, initial resistance is seen at 62.19, followed by a more significant barrier at the 20-day SMA near 62.74. A sustained break above this level would be required to re-establish bullish momentum, while failure to reclaim it keeps price capped within a bearish-to-neutral structure.

Trading conditions favor a range-bound approach until a decisive breakout occurs. Short-term traders may consider buying near support around 61.88 with tight risk controls, targeting moves toward 62.19 or the SMA resistance. Conversely, rejection near resistance could present short opportunities. A breakout above 62.74 would signal renewed bullish momentum, while a breakdown below 61.50 would shift bias further bearish. Risk management remains essential given the compressed volatility environment.
